form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th on March 30 over 295m at this track behind Who You Helping beaten 6 lengths (17.59) in a Class 1. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in his races. The latest effort was a 7 length fourth over 457m at Ascot Park. Hard to have this time.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fifth last time out over 295m at this track. Will not find this easy. Prepared to risk on this occasion.
